name: radineer-autonomous-engine
description: Radineer Autonomous Engine - 自律型コンテンツ生成・投稿・学習ループ

scripts.daily-engine: npm run collect-trends && npm run analyze && npm run generate && npm run publish-note && npm run publish-x && npm run notify
scripts.daily-review: npm run review && npm run notify -- --type=review
scripts.weekly-evolve: npm run evolve && npm run notify -- --type=weekly
